description: 3D multi-source paper cloud visualization (arXiv, bioRxiv, medRxiv)

stories.title: Unified Paper Model
stories.description: Define frozen Python dataclass for papers from any source. Normalize arXiv IDs and bioRxiv DOIs into unified uid format. Include source, title, categories, published date, version, optional authors and DOI.
acceptance: Paper dataclass is frozen and uses slots
Hypothesis roundtrip tests pass for all source types

stories.title: arXiv CSV Adapter
stories.description: Parse weekly CSV files from gha-arxiv-stats-action into Paper objects. Handle multi-category papers (semicolon-separated). Deduplicate by (ID, version).
acceptance: Parses real arXiv CSV samples correctly
Property tests for valid category strings
Returns list[Paper] sorted by published date

stories.title: bioRxiv/medRxiv CSV Adapter
stories.description: Parse weekly CSV files from gha-biorxiv-stats-action into Paper objects. Support both bioRxiv and medRxiv via source field. Deduplicate by (DOI, version).
acceptance: Parses real bioRxiv CSV samples correctly
Returns list[Paper] sorted by published date

stories.title: Multi-Source Ingestion
stories.description: Combine adapters via registry pattern. Ingest from multiple data directories. Deduplicate across sources. Return sorted list of Paper objects.
acceptance: Registry maps source names to adapter instances
Ingests from multiple directories in one call

stories.title: UMAP Layout Engine
stories.description: Compute 3D positions from paper category vectors using UMAP. One-hot encode categories, reduce to 3 dimensions. Z-axis weighted by publication date. Deterministic with fixed seed.
acceptance: Output has x, y, z per paper
Similar categories cluster together (cosine distance test)

stories.title: SQLite Export
stories.description: Write Paper objects with 3D positions to SQLite database. Create indexes on source and published. Create FTS5 virtual table on title and authors.
acceptance: papers.db contains all papers with positions
FTS5 search on title returns correct results
Indexes exist on source and published columns

stories.title: Pipeline CLI
stories.description: Click-based CLI with subcommands: ingest, layout, export. Support --sources, --data-dir, --output, --seed flags. End-to-end from CSV dirs to papers.db.
acceptance: CLI runs end-to-end: CSV dirs → papers.db
Exit code 0 on success, non-zero on error

stories.title: Three.js Scene Setup
stories.description: Create Three.js scene with WebGPU renderer and WebGL2 fallback. OrbitControls for rotate/zoom/pan. Responsive canvas filling viewport. Dark background.
acceptance: WebGL2 fallback works when WebGPU unavailable

stories.title: Paper Points Rendering
stories.description: Load papers.db via sql.js. Query positions into Float32Arrays. Create BufferGeometry Points with per-point color by source/category. Handle 100K+ points at 60fps.
acceptance: sql.js WASM loads and queries successfully

stories.title: Interaction
stories.description: Raycasting on Points for hover detection. Tooltip with title on hover. Click queries full metadata from SQLite. Detail panel shows title, authors, categories, source, date.
acceptance: Click opens detail panel with full metadata
SQL query returns correct paper for clicked point

stories.title: Full-Text Search
stories.description: FTS5 query via sql.js on title/authors. Search input with debounced query. Highlight matching points. Animate camera to centroid of results.

stories.title: GitHub Pages Deployment
stories.description: GitHub Actions workflow: install uv, run pipeline CLI, build Vite frontend, deploy dist/ to GitHub Pages. Trigger on push to main.
acceptance: Live site loads and renders paper cloud
